content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across br_health.rs (new, 274 lines), br_process.rs (~1250 lines added), mod.rs, project.rs, success_reconciliation.rs, service.rs, and tests/cli.rs. The implementation correctly adds: (1) sync_import command construction and gating behind ensure_synced + health checks, (2) sync_if_dirty convenience method with per-mutation journal persistence and cross-process flock serialization, (3) JSONL health checks that detect conflict markers, missing files, malformed records, and br unavailability, (4) pre-operation safety checks at all three bead-mutating entry points (claim_bead_in_br, reconcile_success, handle_propose_new_bead), (5) comprehensive doc comments on sync lifecycle invariants, and (6) thorough unit tests covering healthy/unhealthy files, crash recovery, cross-adapter dirty state detection, concurrent mutation/flush serialization, and gitignore compliance. Verified: lock file (.br-sync.lock) is gitignored via .beads/.gitignore *.lock pattern; pending mutation artifacts are gitignored; nix and uuid dependencies were pre-existing; no TOCTOU issues in the locked paths; failed mutation cleanup correctly preserves prior records; flush is idempotent across adapter instances. All 56 new/modified tests pass. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
